questionHtml:
The sea star Pisaster ochraceus is identified as a keystone species in the Pacific Ocean.

Outline the characteristics of keystone species in an ecosystem.
markschemeHtml:
a. keystone species has a strong/disproportionate effect on a community/food web/ecosystem 

b. absence of keystone species would completely alter the ecosystem

meta.title: The sea star Pisaster ochraceus is identified as a keystone species in the Pacific Ocean. Outline the characteristics of keystone species in an ecosystem.
